title: LOCO War of Glory/League Stage
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE: LOCO War of Glory: League Stage}} {{Tabs static |name1=League Stage|link1=LOCO_War_of_Glory/League_Stage |name2=Grand Finals|link2=LOCO_War_of_Glory/Grand_Finals |this=1 }} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=3 |name=LOCO War of Glory: League Stage |tickername=LOCO: WOG LS |shortname=LOCO: WOG LS |image=LocoWar of Glory logo allmode.png |type=Online |team_number=27 |series=War of Glory |organizer=Villager Esports |organizer-link=https://www.instagram.com/villageresports |sponsor=[https://loco.gg/ LOCO] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=15,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-10-05 |edate=2021-10-22 |twitter=villageresports |instagram=villageresports |web=https://villageresports.in/ |discord=villageresports |facebook=villageresports |youtube=channel/UCciMkz3TP6MldcX_Cw7-PWA |loco=streamers/villager_esports }} '''''[https://loco.gg/ LOCO]''''' in association with '''''[https://www.instagram.com/villageresports/ Villager Esports]''''' present a Invitational BGMI tournament called the '''''LOCO War of Glory''''' with a huge prize pool of ₹55,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. The League Stage of the tournament features a prize-pool of ₹15,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position= Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=HornetFear |b2=Smart Wolf|b2flag=in|b2name=Harsh Gohil |b3=SardarjiYT |b4=HomeShow }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''LOCO War of Glory League Stage:''' 5th October 2021 to 22nd October 2021.'' * ''Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]] and [[Sanhok]] '' * ''27 Teams divided into 3 groups '' (A, B, and C) * '' 9 Teams in each group'' * ''Teams will compete in a round robin format'' * ''99 Matches to be played over a period of 3 weeks (Each team to play 66 Matches).'' * ''27 Matches to be played over a period of 5 days for Week-1 (Each team to play 18 Matches).'' * ''36 Matches to be played over a period of 6 days for Week 2 & 3 (Each team to play 24 Matches).'' * ''{{bgcolortext|up|'''Top 18 teams '''}} from the overall standings will advance to [[LOCO_War_of_Glory/Grand_Finals|Grand Finals]]''. ====Matchdays==== * '''''Week 1''''' ** ''5 Matchdays: 6 Matches on Day 1 & 2 and 5 Matches for the rest of the days.'' * '''''Week 2 & 3''''' ** ''6 Matchdays: 6 Matches to be played each day.'' ** ''2x (AB + CA + BC)'' ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" ! colspan="2"|Points Distribution |- |'''''Finish Points''''' ||''1 per finish'' |- !width=100px|Place !width=100px|Points |- |{{Placement|1}}||15 |- |{{Placement|2}}||12 |- |{{Placement|3}}||10 |- |{{Placement|4}}||8 |- |{{Placement|5}}||6 |- |{{Placement|6}}||4 |- |{{Placement|7}}||2 |- |{{Placement|8-15}}||1 |- |{{Placement|16-18}}||0 |} ===Prize Pool=== {{box|start|padding=2em|}} ₹ 15,00,000 INR (≃$20,229 USD) are spread among the teams as seen below:
